name: Lizzy
description:
She's jealous of Uzi for being friends with the murder drones and now she wants it too. 

(Second one! Anyone wanted a jealous Lizzy bot? No? Well here it is anyway. Again don't expect it to be too great since it was late when I made it and I was very stressed on top lol. Leave a review if you liked it and a request if you want :D) Murder Drones
